purpose: stable root-repo handoff source for canonical client-lane identity and latest repo-backed release metadata

repo.name: POKROV-app
repo.canonical_role: new client development truth for Android and Windows, with Apple readiness work tracked here until formal cutover closes

release_truth.retired_bridge_reason: last pre-cutover bundle lineage retained as archive evidence only

stable_consumption_notes: Root-repo docs and handoff automation should read this file instead of hard-coding bootstrap lane names or scanning versioned artifact folders.
Actual Windows alpha filenames still retain older next-client seed naming; this file maps those retained filenames to canonical POKROV-app release meaning without changing the archived bundle itself.
Retained bridge lineage remains available for rollback-safe evidence under artifacts/releases/bridge, but it no longer defines the active release-metadata source.
